xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: 18, Technocrats Industrial Estate, Balanagar , Hyderabad, Telangana-500037
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: 18, Technocrats Industrial Estate, Balanagar , Hyderabad, Telangana-500037
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: The Company offers products and customized precision engineering solutions and caters to customers in strategic sectors including Civil Nuclear Power, Space & Defence and Clean energy. The Company is a one stop solution for all manufacturing processes such as advanced machining, specialized fabrication, assembly and testing, surface treatment and special processes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Manufacture and Machining of high precision for aerospace, aircraft, spacecraft components.
Manufacture of generators/generating sets for clean energy using hydrogen fuel cell technology
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company’s business is manufacturing of mission critical precision product for aerospace, space, defence, clean energy and civil nuclear sectors. Some of its major clients include Indian Civilian Nuclear Power Program, Indian Space Program, Indian and Global Defence industry as well as Global Clean Energy sectors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Gee Pee Aerospace and Defence Private Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Inefficient waste management may lead to environmental pollution and regulatory penalties, whereas effective waste segregation and recycling improve sustainability and reduce costs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Implementation of a structured waste management system, regular audits, vendor tie-ups for hazardous and non-hazardous waste disposal, and training programs. Reduces waste disposal cost and improves compliance score.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Water scarcity can impact operations, particularly in manufacturing units with high water consumption.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Adoption of rainwater harvesting, installation of water recycling plants, and regular monitoring of water usage. Long-term savings on water bills and ensures business continuity.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Unsafe workplace conditions can lead to injuries, legal actions, downtime, and reputational damage.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Implementation of a robust EHS management system, periodic safety audits, training, and emergency preparedness. Fewer incidents lead to higher productivity and reduced insurance premiums.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Regulatory requirements and stakeholder expectations are pushing industries toward low-carbon operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Carbon footprint analysis, shift to green energy sources, and participation in carbon trading mechanisms. New business opportunities, tax benefits, and brand enhancement.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: A satisfied and safe workforce enhances productivity, retention, and brand loyalty.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Employee grievance redressal mechanisms, welfare programs, inclusivity and fair labor practices.Reduced attrition and improved employee morale.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: The Company has qualified for various management and quality standards such as •AS9100D •ISO 9001:2015 •ISO 45001:2018 •ISO/IEC 27001 : 2022 •ISO 14001:2015 •NADCAP
The Company has qualified for various management and quality standards such as •AS9100D •ISO 9001:2015 •ISO 45001:2018 •ISO/IEC 27001 : 2022 •ISO 14001:2015 •NADCAP

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.

The Company has established internal objectives across all departments to lower energy consumption, optimize raw material usage, ensure zero workplace incidents, and foster diversity and inclusion. Additionally, it aims to expand community engagement initiatives and integrate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles into all areas of its operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: To achieve its sustainability goals, the Company has implemented solar power systems to cut down on energy usage. Efforts are consistently made to minimize raw material consumption, offering both economic and technical benefits. The Company upholds equal opportunity principles by promoting an inclusive workplace free from discrimination based on gender, religion, caste, region, or sexual orientation. Steps have been taken to build a diverse and cosmopolitan workforce, resulting in a higher number of female employees. Continuous monitoring is conducted to track progress toward ESG objectives.

Efforts are consistently made to minimize raw material consumption, offering both economic and technical benefits. The Company upholds equal opportunity principles by promoting an inclusive workplace free from discrimination based on gender, religion, caste, region, or sexual orientation. Steps have been taken to build a diverse and cosmopolitan workforce, resulting in a higher number of female employees. Continuous monitoring is conducted to track progress toward ESG objectives.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Yes. The Company’s BR policies are implemented by the Managing Director of the Company. The CSR Committee and the Risk Management Committee evaluate sustainability related issues, from time to time.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Code of Conduct, Whistle-blower Policy of the Company, Human Rights Policies of the Company, Safety and sustainability training
Code of Conduct, Whistle-blower Policy of the Company, Human Rights Policies of the Company, Safety and sustainability training
Code of Conduct, Whistle-blower Policy of the Company, Human Rights Policies of the Company, Safety and sustainability training
Code of Conduct, Whistle-blower Policy of the Company, Human Rights Policies of the Company, Safety and sustainability training
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: Yes, the Company’s Code of Conduct mandates that board members and employees must steer clear of situations where their personal interests may interfere with the Company’s interests. Directors are obligated to declare annually to the Board any significant interests whether direct, indirect, or on behalf of third parties in any transaction or issue that may have a direct impact on the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: The investment has been towards various sustainability projects such as installation of solar plant , occupational health & safety improvement programmes, in-house machine manufacturing to reduce import of machinery, in-house development of erstwhile imported components for import substitution etc
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Plastic packaging materials are segregated at source and collected separately. Reusable packaging is retained for internal use, and the remaining plastic waste is sent to authorized recyclers as per local pollution control board guidelines. Efforts are also made to minimize single-use plastics in packaging by shifting to biodegradable or recyclable alternatives.

Obsolete electronic items and equipment are identified and handed over to certified E-waste recyclers authorized by the government. An inventory of E-waste is maintained, and disposal is carried out as per E-Waste Management Rules, ensuring no environmental harm during handling or recycling.

Hazardous waste, including used oils, paints, chemicals, and contaminated materials, is stored in labeled, secure containers in designated hazardous waste storage areas. It is disposed of only through Pollution Control Board (PCB)-authorized vendors as per the Hazardous and Other Wastes (Management and Transboundary Movement) Rules. Manifest tracking is used to ensure safe transportation and disposal.

Other non-hazardous industrial waste such as metal scrap, wood, glass, and packaging material is segregated at source. Metal scrap is sent to authorized recyclers. Wood is reused for internal packaging or disposed through vendors for secondary use. All disposal activities follow environmental compliance protocols and internal waste management policies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple2ExplanatoryText: Not applicable as the organization’s business is B2B in nature and the products fall under capital goods category with long lifecycle, the Company has no specific consumer product aside from aerospace and defence products, there is no product reclamation at the end of the product life. However, shipping containers are reused and waste material generated at the plant and project sites are reused, recycled and disposed as per the applicable regulatory requirements.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: The code of conduct provides guidelines for ensuring fairness and acting against discrimination on the basis of disability, race, gender, religion, region, age, or any other factors. The same can be accessed at https://mtar.in/policies-related-documents/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ThePremisesOrOfficesOfTheEntit: Yes, most of the Company’s permanent office buildings and manufacturing locations are accessible to differently abled employees and workers. Such arrangements include easily accessible offices, entrances, doors and availability of ramps and elevators etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Yes, Grievance redressal mechanism is available to all employees as well as stakeholders with procedure for raising of grievances /complaints as well as their escalation and redressal. The same is detailed in the Code of Conduct of the Company.

Yes, Grievance redressal mechanism is available to all employees as well as stakeholders with procedure for raising of grievances /complaints as well as their escalation and redressal. The same is detailed in the Code of Conduct of the Company.

Yes, Grievance redressal mechanism is available to all employees as well as stakeholders with procedure for raising of grievances /complaints as well as their escalation and redressal. The same is detailed in the Code of Conduct of the Company.

Yes, Grievance redressal mechanism is available to all employees as well as stakeholders with procedure for raising of grievances /complaints as well as their escalation and redressal. The same is detailed in the Code of Conduct of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Yes, occupational health and safety management system has been implemented and the Company is certified for ISO 45001:2018
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: The Company follows a structured risk management approach comprising five key steps: Identification, Assessment, Mitigation, Monitoring, and Reporting. All relevant stakeholders actively participate in the risk assessment process. Based on the analysis, appropriate action plans are formulated, documented, and executed within defined timelines.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProcessesForWorkersToReportThe: Yes, the Company has processes for workers to report work related hazards for mitigating such risks.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsIfTheEmployeesOrWorkerO: Yes, The Workers of the Company have access to non-occupational medical and healthcare services and are also covered under Group Medical as well as Accident Insurance Policies by the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Management is strongly committed towards EHS by having risk management process in place to identify hazards and act towards minimising risk. The risk management process has five steps-Identification, Assessment, Mitigation, Monitoring and Reporting. All the stakeholders involved participate in the risk assessment as well as implementation of mitigation measures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: All the safety related incidents are investigated properly as per the defined process. Appropriate corrective as well as preventive actions in line with our EHS standards are designed and implemented after Root Cause analysis is done.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple3ExplanatoryText: Assessment of value chain partners on the aspects of health and safety and workplace conditions is currently not in practice.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company ensures that all relevant clauses relating to statutory compliance are met. These are a stan dard feature in our contracts / orders and bills are processed subject to compliance requirements being met.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableTrans: The Company provides transition assistance programmes to facilitate continued employability and the management of careers till retirement.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa:
All safety-related incidents are thoroughly investigated following the defined internal procedures. Based on the findings, suitable corrective and preventive action plans are developed and implemented to mitigate risks and enhance workplace safety.
Health & Safety Initiatives: Adequate placement of first aid kits, fire prevention systems, firefighting equipment, and engineering controls are ensured to uphold a safe and healthy work environment.
Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) is issued to all employees. Regular training and awareness programs are conducted to ensure proper usage and adherence to safety standards.
Working Condition Improvements: All employees are compensated in accordance with statutory minimum wage requirements.
Eligible employees are provided with statutory social security and welfare benefits, including Provident Fund (PF), Employees' State Insurance (ESI), Gratuity, and Bonus.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif:
The entity identifies stakeholders as individuals or groups who influence or contribute to the company’s operations, value creation, and compliance, either directly or indirectly. These include regulators, customers, suppliers, employees, local communities, and ESG-related bodies.
To ensure effective stakeholder engagement, the company conducts thorough assessments and regularly interacts with stakeholders through one-on-one discussions. This helps in understanding their expectations, mitigating potential risks, building credibility, and fostering trust.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Quarterly performance reviews and updates are conducted by respective Board committees on economic, environmental, and social matters. The consolidated reports and key outcomes are presented during quarterly Board meetings. The company also ensures ongoing stakeholder engagement activities. Feedback received through these engagements is shared with the relevant committees, which meet periodically to assess and monitor the company’s progress in their respective areas.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: Stakeholder inputs, gathered through materiality assessments and engagement efforts, are utilized to identify and prioritize ESG-related concerns. These insights help guide the company’s strategy, policy development, and monitoring mechanisms to ensure alignment with stakeholder expectations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement:
The company is actively involved in supporting marginalized communities through continuous engagement in areas like childcare, healthcare, and education. This is done in partnership with organizations such as:
St. Jude India Child Care Centres
Sri Satya Sai Annapoorna Trust
Parampara Foundation
Learning Space Foundation
Grace Foundation
Abhayajyothi Society for Empowerment of People
Key initiatives include:
Distribution of sanitary napkins to underprivileged women.
Training and recruiting college apprentices in manufacturing technologies.
Conducting relationship-building and development programs via academic institutions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Engagement through CEO/MD messages, communication from unit heads, training programs, and employee-focused initiatives.

Regular support for community development in education, healthcare, and sanitation through partnerships (e.g., St. Jude India, Sri Satya Sai Trust, Parampara Foundation). Activities include providing sanitary products, skill training for college apprentices, and relationship-building programs.
Engagement through grievance handling, supply chain queries, and review meetings with the SCM Head.
Engagement through MIS before listing, email updates, analyst interactions, press releases, annual reports, and official presentations.
Sharing statutory updates and performance reviews of the company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Managing Director of the Company addresses all human rights impacts of the business. All grievances received are recorded, duly analysed, investigated and suitable actions as appropriate are taken to resolve them.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The Company has policies in place such as Prevention of Sexual Harassment Policy, Code of Conduct which require employees to behave responsibly in their action and conduct. The Whistle Blower policy allows the employees to report incidents which are unethical or discriminatory. The Company also has an Internal Complaints Committee for the protection of women at workplace.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:HumanRightsRequirementsFormPar: Adherence to required compliance including child labour, forced labour and human rights form a part of the Company’s business agreements and contracts.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: No complaints have been received for human rights violation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: The organization adheres to the standards and approaches laid out for the employees, workers and associates, which are extended across the value chain partners representatives. All the concerned entities adhere to the ethical conduct of business.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: the Company implements water conservation through reduce, reuse, recharge and recycle approach, enabling the Company to implement ZLD at its locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyIfAnyIn: Yes. Assessed by Telangana State Pollution Control Board.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProjectRelatedToReducingGreenH: Some of our products and their development are our major contribution towards clean technology thereby contributing to reduction in global carbon footprint and greenhouse emissions. As part of our green initiative as well as thrust towards renewable energy, we have set up solar rooftop panels across the units for captive power generation and switched over to LED lights.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: We dispose most of our waste which comes in the form of metal shavings and machining scrap to vendors who then re-melt the same for re-use, thereby leading to conservation of natural resources. Also, our products are transported in biodegradable plywood cartons that are re-usable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: The Company has emergency preparedness plans in place to deal with any sort of emergency situations, hazards & risks, including the provision for first aid. Relevant information and Basic training related to emergency preparedness and response is provided to the employees where the duties and responsibilities of various entities are communicated. In case of occurrence of any unfortunate incident in the plant, proper analysis is carried out and appropriate preventive measures are initiated to avoid recurrence in future.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: No significant adverse impact reported from any value chain partners.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple6ExplanatoryText: As of now, the Company does not have any formal assessment mechanism to monitor the environmental impact of value chain partners’ activities. However The code of conduct and ethics policy is applicable to all the business partners which urges one to align their goals with that of the socio-environment regulations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple7ExplanatoryText: The Company has not engaged in any anti-competitive conduct
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: The Federation of Telangana Chambers of Commerce and Industry
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: A Grievance redressal policy for the community is in place, including mechanisms and procedure for raising of grievances/complaints as well as their escalation and redressal in line with the Code of Conduct of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple8ExplanatoryText: No. Ours being a highly technical domain dealing with a niche clientele, the suppliers are often limited to those who are qualified by the customer.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CSRProject: Women’s International Summit on Entrepreneurship & B2B (WISE) 2025
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: Consumers/Public are furnished with various choices to interface with the Organization through email, phone, and site. The Company has a committed personnel to respond to their queries and receive feedback in order to improve its services.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The Company’s business offerings can be found on the website https://mtar.in/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: All Business segments of the Company comply with the regulations and relevant voluntary codes concerning the communications and pitch designed for the consumers. The Company’s communications are aimed to enable the customers to make informed purchase decisions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: The Company works on make to order system, however the Company has necessary mechanisms in place to inform consumers if any major discontinuation happens.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableProdu: Not applicable, as the Company operates in B2B model.
